arts.ttl: Inter to take on Venezia in pursuit of top spot
arts.sum: Venezia haven’t lost in their last three league games at the Penzo stadium (W1 D2), the Venetians could register more consecutive home matches without defeat in Serie A for the first time since December 2001 (four under Giuseppe Iachini). After Inter`s 2-0 win at the Penzo stadium on 27th November 2021, Venezia could suffer consecutive home defeats against the Nerazzurri in the top flight for only the second time in their history, after the period between 1963 and 1967 (exactly two in that case).

arts.ttl: Manchester United and Leicester City Set Sights on Inter Milan’s Rising Star Francesco Pio Esposito
arts.sum: Francesco Pio Esposito, the youngest of the talented Esposito brothers, has been making waves in Italian football with his exceptional performances. The 19-year-old striker, currently on loan at Spezia from Inter Milan, has caught the attention of two prominent English clubs: Manchester United and Leicester City.
